dashboard.noMailDesc: Scan your first piece of mail to get started

mailCard.rejectedFallback: This does not appear to be valid postal mail.
mailCard.errorDesc: Could not read this mail. Tap to view details.

mailDetail.infoOnly: This item is for your information only

agenda.allClearDesc: You have no upcoming deadlines or overdue items.

directory.noContactsDesc: Scan some mail to build your directory

gmail.title: Gmail
gmail.description: Sync actionable emails — invoices, bills, reminders, and letters with attachments — directly into your Robin inbox.
gmail.howStep1: Scans your last 7 days of Primary & Updates inbox
gmail.howStep2: Automatically skips newsletters, promotions, and social emails
gmail.howStep3: Uses AI to identify emails that genuinely need your attention
gmail.howStep4: Analyzes email body and any PDF/image attachments
gmail.howStep5: Results appear in your Dashboard alongside scanned mail
gmail.needStep1: A Google account with a Gmail inbox
gmail.needStep2: Robin will only request read-only access — it cannot send or delete emails

sharing.title: Dashboard Sharing
sharing.description: Share your mail with a partner, family member, or flatmate. They get a read-only view of what you choose to share.
sharing.noCatsHint: No categories auto-shared — use the share button on individual mail items.
sharing.catsHint: Auto-sharing: {{cats}}. You can also share individual items manually.
sharing.inviteHint: They need a Robin account. Once accepted, you'll each control what you share.
sharing.inviteAutoSuccess: Connected with {{name}}! Both of you can now manage what you share.

push.title: Push Notifications
push.description: Get notified on this device when a reminder is due or a deadline has passed without action — even when the app is closed.
push.notSupported: Push notifications are not supported in this browser.
push.notConfigured: Push notifications are not configured on the server. Set VAPID_PUBLIC_KEY, VAPID_PRIVATE_KEY, and VAPID_EMAIL in your .env file.
push.permissionDenied: Notification permission was denied. Please enable it in your browser settings and reload.
push.notifyReminder: ⏰ A reminder you set is due
push.notifyOverdue: 🚨 A due date has passed and you haven't acted yet

scanner.title: Scan Your Mail
scanner.pagesAdded: {{count}} page(s) added — add more or scan now
scanner.subtitle: Take a photo or upload images of your mail
scanner.dropZone: Drop images or PDF here, or tap to browse
scanner.pasteHint: or press Ctrl+V to paste a screenshot
scanner.multiPageHint: Multi-page documents: select multiple files at once

voice.hint: Tap to start recording your reminder
voice.subHint: Speak naturally — Robin will extract the date, amount, and key details
voice.idleHint: Tap to start recording your reminder
voice.idleSub: Speak naturally — Robin will extract the date, amount, and key details
voice.analyzingHint: Robin is transcribing your memo and extracting reminder details…
voice.errorDenied: Microphone access denied. Please allow microphone access in your browser settings.
voice.errorNotFound: No microphone found. Please connect a microphone and try again.
voice.errorTooShort: Recording is too short. Please record at least 1 second.

action.whatToDo: What would you like to do?

sepa.title: SEPA Payment
sepa.qrHint: Scan with your banking app (Sparkasse, DKB, ING, N26, Revolut and most European banking apps support EPC GiroCode)
sepa.deepLinkHint: Opens your default banking app with payment details pre-filled.
sepa.deepLinkSupported: Supported by: Sparkasse, DKB, Volksbank, Postbank, Commerzbank, ING (DE), and others.
sepa.ibanRequired: IBAN is required for a payment link.

consent.disclaimer: By checking the box below you acknowledge that the developer(s) take no ownership or responsibility for any damage arising from the use of this application.
consent.checkboxLabel: I have read and accept the Terms of Use and Privacy Notice. I consent to my data being processed as described above, including the sending of my mail images, email content, and attachments to Google Gemini AI for analysis. I understand I can withdraw consent and delete all my data at any time.

privacy.dataPrivacyDesc: GDPR rights — export or delete your personal data. Your data is encrypted at rest.
privacy.confirmDeleteBody:
This will irreversibly delete:
• Your account and profile
• All scanned mail and analysis
• All uploaded images
• All sharing connections

This action cannot be undone. Type "delete" in the next prompt to confirm.
privacy.confirmDeletePrompt: Type "delete" to confirm permanent account deletion:

cookie.description: — a single httpOnly session cookie to keep you signed in. No tracking, no analytics, no third-party cookies.
cookie.detail: By continuing to use Robin you agree to our Privacy Policy. You can delete your data or account at any time.

landing.heroSub: Robin scans your postal mail and email, extracts what matters — due dates, amounts, IBANs, appointments — and tells you exactly what to do. No more paper piles.
landing.featuresTitle: Everything you need to stay on top of your mail
landing.featuresSub: Scan paper mail, sync Gmail, and let AI do the heavy lifting.
landing.featureScanDesc: Snap a photo of any letter, bill, or notice. Robin reads it, extracts due dates, amounts, IBANs, and tells you exactly what to do.
landing.featureGmailDesc: Connect your inbox and Robin automatically finds actionable emails — bills, appointments, legal notices — and pulls them in. Read-only, no email is ever sent.
landing.featureAiDesc: Powered by Google Gemini. Every document is categorised, prioritised, and key details are extracted so you never miss a deadline.
landing.featureCalendarDesc: Due dates land on your calendar automatically. Get reminded 2 days before a bill is due or an appointment arrives.
landing.featureDirectoryDesc: Robin builds a directory of every sender and receiver — your utility company, doctor, tax office — and groups their mail together.
landing.featureEncryptionDesc: AES-256-GCM encryption at rest. Your documents, extracted data, and tokens are encrypted on disk and in the database. No data is sold or shared.
landing.step1Desc: Take a photo of a letter or connect your Gmail. Robin handles both.
landing.step2Desc: Gemini reads every word, extracts due dates, amounts, reference numbers, and categorises it.
landing.step3Desc: See exactly what needs your attention. Pay, reply, schedule — then archive with one tap.
landing.privacySub: Robin is built for people who take their data seriously.
landing.privacyReadOnlyDesc: Robin cannot send, modify, or delete your emails. Gmail scope is strictly read-only.
landing.privacyEncryptedDesc: All personal data, documents, tokens, and extracted details are encrypted with AES-256-GCM.
landing.privacyMinimalDesc: Only actionable emails are stored. Newsletters, promos, and social emails are skipped and never saved.
landing.privacyGdprDesc: Export, rectify, or permanently delete all your data at any time. Your data, your rules.
landing.faq1q: What data does Robin access from my Gmail?
landing.faq1a: Robin requests read-only access to your Gmail inbox. It scans the last 7 days for actionable emails (bills, appointments, legal notices). Newsletters, promotions, and social emails are automatically skipped. Robin cannot send, modify, or delete your emails.
landing.faq2a: Your data is stored on the Robin server with AES-256-GCM encryption at rest. Mail images, extracted text, financial information, and OAuth tokens are all encrypted. Passwords are hashed with bcrypt.
landing.faq3q: Can I delete all my data?
landing.faq3a: Yes. You can export all your data as JSON at any time, and permanently delete your account with one click. Deletion is immediate and irreversible — all mail, images, tokens, and connections are removed.
landing.faq4a: Yes. Robin collects only the data necessary to provide the service, processes it with your explicit consent, and gives you full control (access, rectify, erase, export, object). No data is shared with third parties except Google Gemini for AI analysis.
landing.faq5a: Robin is a self-hosted open-source tool. You run it yourself. The only external cost is the Google Gemini API, which has a generous free tier that covers personal use.
landing.ctaTitle: Ready to take control of your mail?
landing.ctaSub: Free, private, and open source. Start in under a minute.
